body_text:
597

masīt occurs in the Ormurī language spoken in Afghanistan. Of course,
the form bagšis with g (No. 145) does not occur in India.¹
173. Argon occurs in Kāshmīrī in the same sense.
footnotes:
¹ The final g (pronounced k) is a purely graphic, not a phonetic phenomenon;
Tibetan writing has no final k.—[B.L.]
